case isTrue
n₁ n₂ : Int
d₁ d₂ : Nat
z₁ : d₁ ≠ 0
z₂ : d₂ ≠ 0
h✝ : n₁.natAbs.gcd d₁ = 1
⊢ ({ num := n₁, den := d₁, den_nz := ⋯, reduced := ⋯ } +
      if hg : n₂.natAbs.gcd d₂ = 1 then { num := n₂, den := d₂, den_nz := ⋯, reduced := ⋯ }
      else { num := n₂.div ↑(n₂.natAbs.gcd d₂), den := d₂ / n₂.natAbs.gcd d₂, den_nz := ⋯, reduced := ⋯ }) =
    if hg : (n₁ * ↑d₂ + n₂ * ↑d₁).natAbs.gcd (d₁ * d₂) = 1 then
      { num := n₁ * ↑d₂ + n₂ * ↑d₁, den := d₁ * d₂, den_nz := ⋯, reduced := ⋯ }
    else
      { num := (n₁ * ↑d₂ + n₂ * ↑d₁).div ↑((n₁ * ↑d₂ + n₂ * ↑d₁).natAbs.gcd (d₁ * d₂)),
        den := d₁ * d₂ / (n₁ * ↑d₂ + n₂ * ↑d₁).natAbs.gcd (d₁ * d₂), den_nz := ⋯, reduced := ⋯ }
